candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; best representation of top-line sales.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Interest income, financial not operating; not suitable for total revenue.
Tax line, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings available to common shareholders, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue; represents accrued but not yet received income.

variables.notes: Total Revenue is the clear top-line revenue measure; other candidates are non-operating or non-revenue lines.

candidates.why: Likely includes crew and direct operating personnel costs for vessels; best proxy for direct operating costs in absence of explicit cost of sales line.
Generic operating expenses that, for a shipping company, likely include direct voyage and vessel operating costs; appropriate as part of COGS bucket.
R&D, not cost of sales; should not be included in COGS.
Additional operating expense bucket; likely includes operating costs tied to service delivery; reasonable to include in COGS when no separate COGS line exists.
Duplicate concept of R&D; not cost of sales.
Net operating result measure, mixes revenues and costs; not a pure COGS component.
Financial, not operating cost of sales.
Financial expense, not COGS.
Financial expense, not COGS.
Financial expense, not COGS.
Supplemental/alternative staff expense label but appears unused; less informative than main Personnel expenses line.
Could be overhead; unclear linkage to direct production costs and appears unused; excluded in favor of more central operating cost lines.
Balance sheet asset, not current-period cost of sales.
Liability timing adjustment, not the expense line itself.
Liability timing adjustment, not the expense line itself.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS/cost of sales line exists; for a vessel/shipping business, the main direct operating cost buckets are Personnel expenses, Other Operating Expenses, and Other Other Operating Expense, which together approximate cost of services provided.

candidates.why: Personnel costs often include both direct and overhead staff; used here as part of SG&A components in absence of a clean split.
Generic operating overhead components likely embedded; included as SG&A component per guidance when no distinct SG&A vs COGS split is available.
Additional operating overhead bucket; appropriate as part of SG&A components.
Clearly administrative overhead; canonical SG&A component.
Duplicate admin concept; also clear SG&A overhead component.
Explicit SG&A line; although preview values are empty, its presence implies use in at least one year and should be included per hierarchy rules.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty in the recent-year preview; per instructions it is included plus major operating overhead buckets (administration and broader personnel/other operating expenses) to capture SG&A over the full history while excluding depreciation, impairments, interest, and totals.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; even if current preview is empty, presence indicates use in at least one year.
Alternative R&D label; likely used in different periods; should be included to capture all reported R&D.

variables.notes: Both R&D labels are included as a priority list to capture research and development expense across all years.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; best representation of financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; a component of overall interest expense and appropriate fallback when main interest expense line is missing.
Represents allocation of profit, not an interest expense; should not be used for XINT.
Represents allocation of profit, not an interest expense; should not be used for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; used as additional fallback for interest expense.
Equity component, not interest expense.
Equity component, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Interest expense is captured as a priority list: main Interest Expense first, then lease-related interest lines as fallbacks if the primary line is missing for some years.

candidates.why: Income from equity-accounted investments, not an equity balance; inappropriate for BE.
Component of equity but not total book equity; better to use aggregate equity attributable to majority shareholders.
Component of equity but not the total; less suitable than explicit total majority equity line.
Explicitly represents equity attributable to majority shareholders/owners; ideal for BE as it excludes non-controlling interests.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; only used if no parent-only equity line exists, which is not the case here.

variables.notes: Book equity is mapped to Total equity majority shareholders to capture equity attributable to parent shareholders and exclude non-controlling interests, in line with PROF methodology.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of result, not the balance sheet stock; balance sheet non-controlling interests is preferable for MIB.
Income statement allocation; not the equity balance itself.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; ideal representation of minority equity (MIB).
Duplicate label for non-controlling interests; included as alternate label for other periods.

candidates.row_label: CI - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to minorities, not the equity balance; not appropriate for MIB stock measure.

variables.notes: Minority interest is taken from the balance sheet as Non-controlling interests with Minority Interest as an alternate label, ensuring MIB represents the equity stake of non-controlling shareholders.
